scripts.repo:validate: npm run build --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli && npm run repo:cli --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli -- validate --config apps/ddd-spec-viewer/ddd-spec.config.yaml
scripts.repo:build: npm run build --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli && npm run repo:cli --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli -- build --config apps/ddd-spec-viewer/ddd-spec.config.yaml
scripts.repo:viewer: npm run build --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli && npm run repo:cli --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli -- viewer --config apps/ddd-spec-viewer/ddd-spec.config.yaml --
scripts.verify: npm run repo:build && npm run pkg:test && npm run build --workspace=apps/ddd-spec-viewer
scripts.release:dry-run: npm run verify && npm run changeset:status && npm run changeset:version && npm publish --dry-run --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli
